title: Initialize Android Project Foundation
objective: Bootstrap a working Jetpack Compose Android project with Hilt DI, Compose Navigation, and the clean architecture package structure. The blank app must compile and run.
execution_steps: Generate standard Android project structure with Jetpack Compose template
Add dependencies to app/build.gradle.kts: Compose, Room, Hilt, Compose Navigation, Kotlin Coroutines
Create NavHost with placeholder routes: Dashboard, Timeline, FastEntry, Settings, Reconcile
Create package structure: ui/, domain/usecase/, data/local/, data/repository/, di/
Create DatabaseModule and RepositoryModule (empty Hilt modules)
Update AGENTS.md: set BUILD_CMD=./gradlew assembleDebug and LINT_CMD=./gradlew lint
definition_of_done: AGENTS.md BUILD_CMD and LINT_CMD filled in
